summary: GH-100 minimal formal spec is sufficient for the desktop shell skeleton PR. The spec, plan, and implementation contract constrain this item to the runnable Electron/Vite/React/TypeScript shell foundation and explicitly exclude follow-on Task Thread UI/runtime behavior.
reviewed_validation_summary: `git diff --check` passed; `npm audit --audit-level=high` passed with 0 vulnerabilities; `npm run typecheck` passed; `npm run smoke` passed and built Electron main/preload plus Vite renderer; `npm run start` short launch reached Electron without error output after binary install; `loom doctor --target . --json`, `loom verify --target . --json`, `loom fact-chain --target . --json`, and `loom suite validate --target . --item GH-100 --json` passed.
follow_ups: #101/#102/#103/#104 must not treat this spec approval as completion of primitives, source health, Settings, Task Thread layout, task submission, run/result views, evidence rendering, Browser management, or Library management.
